seoTitle: Number One vs Numbla Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Number One and Numbla Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Number One vs Numbla Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Number One and Numbla Vale.
heading: Number One vs Numbla Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Number One, New South Wales and Numbla Vale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Numbla Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Number One (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Number One or Numbla Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Number One has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Numbla Vale scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Number One scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Numbla Vale scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Number One or Numbla Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Numbla Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
